name: Calves (Gastrocnemius & Soleus)

landmarks.notes: Little indirect work; tolerates frequent training. Knee angle selects the head trained. Estimate only.

frequency_notes: Responds to high frequency (2-4x/week) of direct work.
training_notes: Straight-leg raises (standing/leg-press) target the gastrocnemius; bent-knee (seated) raises target the soleus. Pause in the stretched bottom position; avoid bouncing.
